question: What are the techniques to apply during a spin recovery? (Fixed wing)

options.text: P-Power Idle, A-Aileron Neutral, R-Rudder Opposite, E-Elevator Through Neutral.
A-Aileron Neutral, R-Rudder Opposite, E-Elevator Through Neutral, P-Power Idle.
R-Rudder Opposite, E-Elevator Through Neutral, P-Power Idle, A-Aileron Neutral.

classification_notes: Spin stages and recovery are stall/spin syllabus content.
